title: Measurement of GRI Porosity for Shale Sample
author: Fangwen Chen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.icycaxw
materials: Crush the shale sample into 80-200 mesh.

steps.title: Preheat 250g shale sample a vacuum...
steps.instruction: Preheat 250g shale sample a vacuum oven at 100 °C for 12-16 hours to remove pore fluids, such as water and oil.

steps.title: Measure the weight and bulk volume of the shale sample
steps.instruction: Measure the weight and bulk volume of the shale sample.

steps.title: Calculate the bulk density ρ b of the shale sample
steps.instruction: Calculate the bulk density ρ b of the shale sample.

steps.title: Measure the weight and grain volume of the shale sample
steps.instruction: Measure the weight and grain volume of the shale sample.

steps.title: Calculate the grain density ρ g of the shale sample
steps.instruction: Calculate the grain density ρ g of the shale sample.

steps.title: Calculate The GRI porosity Ф GRI...
steps.instruction: Calculate The GRI porosity Ф GRI of the sample using the following formula: Ф GRI = ( ρ g - ρ b )/ ρ g ×100%.
